name: joshspeagle-site
description: Self-hosted webfonts for joshspeagle.github.io. Fonts are vendored from node_modules into assets/fonts/ by scripts/setup_fonts.py; tokens + HTML are built in Python. (esbuild/PostCSS minification + CI is a later build-hardening pass.)

scripts.build: python scripts/build_tokens.py && python scripts/setup_fonts.py && python scripts/build_html.py
